message:
fix(benchmarks): use actual @logic_table extern fn, not hand-written Zig

- bench_logic_table.zig and bench_pushdown.zig now call VectorOps_dot_product
  (compiled from Python by metal0) instead of hand-written Zig loops
- Make DuckDB UDF use np.dot (same as Polars UDF) for fair comparison
- Fix Polars UDF per-row allocation (query vector defined outside function)
- Link lib/vector_ops.a to bench_pushdown in build.zig
